failure_reason: Added text-summary-learning as a Form-native summarizer lane and llm-feature-channel-floor as the catalog of LLM-like native feature channels. text-summary-learning returns 262143 four-way and proves source-doc/proof-log/runtime-event/dialogue summary learning, quality/refusal gates, token-cost CHOICE-RECEIPT learning, local/remote oracle rows, and a low-token Form-native candidate winner. llm-feature-channel-floor returns 131071 four-way and proves twenty-three queryable feature rows with floor/north-star text, native plans for summarize/tool-select/tool-execute/code-lower, summary gate composition, explicit no-plan for unknown features, oracle mappings, and speech/vision/multimodal rows. Remaining work is physical heldout samples for retrieval, generation, actual tool execution, code lowering, and audio/video lanes.
